title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown explores how logarithmic transformations of images relate to conformal maps from complex analysis, using M.C. Escher's Print Gallery as a concrete example. The video demonstrates the mathematical structure underlying the artwork and how complex exponential and logarithmic functions create the intricate recursive patterns.
